uplink.description: Temp/RH data notification (0x01): onboard temperature + humidity
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected.data produced by running this codec, with the RS1xx wire decode cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js (humidity 45.50, temperature 21.25, battery band 60-80%).

uplink.description: Aggregated Temp/RH notification (0x02): newest reading at top level, older in history
uplink._note: Synthetic 2-reading aggregated frame (timestamp = 2015-01-01T00:00:00Z epoch base); expected.data produced by running this codec, RS1xx readings cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: Single backlog message (0x03): timestamped temperature + humidity
uplink._note: Synthetic backlog frame with the configurationError option flag set (byte[1]=0x02); expected.data produced by running this codec, cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: Multiple backlog messages (0x04): newest at top level, older in history
uplink._note: Synthetic 2-reading backlog frame; expected.data produced by running this codec, RS1xx readings cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: Open/closed contact sensor state (0x09): maps to action.contactState
uplink._note: Synthetic contact-sensor state frame (state byte=1 -> open); the upstream decoder reports state "Open" for the same bytes. expected.data produced by running this codec.
Synthetic battery frame; voltage 3.30 V. Upstream reports voltage 3.30 for the same bytes. expected.data produced by running this codec.

uplink.description: Wrong length for a known message type is rejected
uplink._note: A 0x01 (temp/RH) frame must be exactly 11 bytes; a short frame is rejected, matching the upstream length guard.
Message-type byte 0xC8 is not a decodable uplink; upstream returns the same error string.
